Very similar to blackberries. They are available April to May (that i know of) but have a lot of thorns so bring gloves and boots! Go to the entrance of Miccosukee Canopy Greenway and go left and you will soon see hundreds of them to the left of the clearing.
Blackberry Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-unknown.
Black Elderberry. Flowers (eldeblow) in Early June. Access: Public.
